items.title: NFL Draft Primer for Notre Dame Football
items.summary: We have finally arrived at the NFL Draft after the incredibly long process, and we get to see where the Notre Dame football players land in the league. The 2026 NFL Draft Round 1 begins Thursday, April 23, at 8 p.m. ET (5 p.m. PT) in Pittsburgh, PA, broadcast on ESPN, ABC, and NFL Network. Rounds 2–3 follow on Friday, […]

items.title: Why does Notre Dame want a 24 team college football playoff?
items.summary: Just like it used to be with conference realignment, every college football offseason now sees the potential for tweaks to the college football playoff. Notre Dame, as a conference unto itself, is a big part of these conversations and votes. Recently, they had their annual spring meeting for the CFP, and expansion to the playoff […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 3-Star Florida Safety John Gay III commits to the Irish
items.summary: The Notre Dame Fighting Irish saw a safety decommit this past week, but quickly gained another to its fold. On Wednesday, 3-Star safety John Gay III gave his public commitment to Marcus Freeman and the 2027 Nore Dame Football recruiting class. The 6’1” 190 pound safety from Chaminade-Madonna High School in Hollywood, Florida, chose the […]

items.title: The All Notre Dame All-NFL Draft Team since 2000
items.summary: It’s NFL Draft week, and it’s also a very important time for the Notre Dame football program. In a lot of ways, the draft is a validation of a healthy program — although it’s not always the case (see the Miami Hurricanes for most of the last 20 years). items.title: How to watch Notre Dame Football’s Blue-Gold Game
items.summary: It’s game week y’all. After almost two months of practice and prep, a version of what the 2026 Notre Dame football team will be unleashed this Saturday in Notre Dame’s annual Blue-Gold Game. items.title: CJ Carr continues to get rave reviews for his performance this spring
items.summary: It’s a busy week for Notre Dame Football. The Irish are wrapping up with spring football by playing in the Blue-Gold Game this Saturday, and beginning Thursday night, the NFL Draft will consume most football fans with its 3 days of coverage.
